recommendations.title: Implement Database Backup Strategy
recommendations.recommendation: Set up automated daily backups to Azure Blob Storage with 30-day retention. Enable point-in-time restore capabilities in PostgreSQL. Test backup restoration monthly.
recommendations.cause: No current backup mechanism for critical production data
recommendations.risk: Complete data loss in case of database corruption or failure

recommendations.title: Optimize Backend Memory Usage
recommendations.recommendation: Profile application memory consumption. Implement object pooling for frequently created objects. Review and optimize data structures in job processor.
recommendations.cause: Memory leaks detected in backend API during load testing
recommendations.risk: Service crashes, production downtime, poor user experience

recommendations.title: Configure Connection Pool Limits
recommendations.recommendation: Review PostgreSQL connection pool settings. Implement connection pooling middleware (PgBouncer). Set max_connections to 200 with application pool size 50-100.
recommendations.cause: Potential connection pool exhaustion under load

recommendations.title: Implement API Response Caching
recommendations.recommendation: Add HTTP caching headers (ETag, Cache-Control) to read endpoints. Implement Redis caching for frequently accessed API responses. Cache TTL: 5 minutes for most endpoints.
recommendations.cause: Average API response time 850ms, p95 2.1 seconds
recommendations.risk: Poor user experience, potential client-side timeouts

recommendations.title: Add Input Validation Middleware
recommendations.recommendation: Implement comprehensive input validation using express-validator. Sanitize all file uploads. Implement file type whitelist. Add size limits (max 100MB per file).
recommendations.cause: Missing input validation on file upload endpoints
recommendations.risk: Potential security vulnerability to malicious file uploads

recommendations.title: Implement Rate Limiting
recommendations.recommendation: Deploy express-rate-limit middleware. Set limits: 100 requests/minute for public endpoints, 1000 requests/minute for authenticated API. Use Redis for distributed rate limiting.
recommendations.cause: No rate limiting mechanism in place
recommendations.risk: Vulnerability to DoS attacks, resource exhaustion

recommendations.title: Optimize Frontend Bundle Size
recommendations.recommendation: Implement code splitting for routes. Compress images with WebP format. Review and remove unused dependencies. Target bundle size: <500KB (gzipped).
recommendations.cause: Frontend bundle size 2.1MB, 640KB gzipped, exceeds 500KB target
recommendations.risk: Slow initial load times on mobile networks

recommendations.title: Implement Structured Logging
recommendations.recommendation: Replace console.log with Winston or Pino structured logging. Include correlation IDs in all logs. Configure centralized logging to ELK stack or Azure Monitor.
recommendations.cause: Insufficient error logging makes production debugging difficult
recommendations.risk: Difficult root cause analysis during incidents

recommendations.title: Add Health Check Endpoint
recommendations.recommendation: Implement comprehensive /health endpoint returning: database connectivity, cache status, disk space, memory usage. Kubernetes liveness/readiness probes for container health.
recommendations.risk: Cannot detect service degradation before complete failure

recommendations.title: Establish CI/CD Pipeline
recommendations.recommendation: Set up GitHub Actions for automated testing, building, and deployment. Implement staging environment. Require code review and tests before merge. Auto-deploy to production on tag creation.
recommendations.risk: Manual deployments are error-prone, slow, inconsistent

recommendations.title: Implement Application Performance Monitoring
recommendations.recommendation: Set up Application Insights or New Relic APM. Monitor transaction response times, error rates, database query performance. Configure alerts for anomalies.
recommendations.cause: No APM system, no metrics or alerts
recommendations.risk: Cannot detect performance degradation or anomalies
